pi_items.source: Task prompt instructions and OpenBCI_GUI source code (ADS1299SettingsBoard.pde enum InputType)
OpenBCI_GUI source code (ADS1299SettingsBoard.pde initialization Arrays.fill(values.inputType, InputType.NORMAL))

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring an OpenBCI Cyton synthetic session to measure the internal noise floor by shorting the inputs of the first 4 channels. Verification from the OpenBCI_GUI source code confirms that the 'InputType' enum includes 'NORMAL' and 'SHORTED', and that all channels are initialized to 'NORMAL' by default. The expected screenshot path, target channels (1-4), target input type ('SHORTED'), default channels (5-8), and default input type ('NORMAL') match the explicit task instructions and validated GUI behavior.
